a:r.a:t: to improve liquidity management and forecasting accuracy?
and move from reactive to proactive collections?
a centralized, real-time, and proactive insights of Accounts Receivable

By leveraging SAP Datasphere for data modeling, SAC for dashboard, and SAP Databricks for advanced analytics, the solution moves beyond static reporting to offer predictive insights into payment behavior and overdue risk.
Utilizes ML to forecast the likelihood of on-time payments and identify high-risk invoices.
Automatically generates a prioritized task list for the collections team based on delinquency risk, ensuring focus on high-impact accounts.
